subcodes.first_line: O thou who art a new grown tree on the meadow of Truth! Thy letter dated October 14, 1920 has been received.
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @growth of the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @newspapers and the media; publications
